data.title: MShape Beauty Ltd. Announces Exclusive U.S. Distribution Agreement for Advanced Electromagnetic Body Sculpting Technologies
data.description: MShape Beauty Ltd, a prominent aesthetics device company, has announced a strategic agreement that will increase its presence and distribution of EMSHAPE® NEO and PERFECT SHAPE® NEO systems in the United States. This agreement aims to expand access to these advanced technologies throughout the country. The agreement was finalized on April 15, 2026 in New York. MShape Beauty is recognized for its cutting-edge solutions in the beauty industry.

data.title: Adam Back suggests Bitcoin should start preparing for quantum computing, even though it's still in the experimental stage.
data.description: Back suggested implementing optional upgrades to enable Bitcoin to transition to quantum-resistant cryptography when necessary, ensuring maximum security for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Anthropic's Mythos Triggers Cybersecurity Race — CrowdStrike, Rubrik, Cloudflare Stand To Gain
data.description: Anthropic has introduced Project Glasswing and the Claude Mythos frontier model, a game-changing development in cybersecurity. This AI system can autonomously detect and exploit software vulnerabilities on a large scale. The breakthrough Mythos model has received impressive scores, with 93.9% on SWE-bench Verified and 83.1% on CyberGym, signaling a significant advancement in software engineering and cybersecurity defense. This innovation is not seen as a threat to existing cybersecurity companies but as a catalyst for increased demand for real-time protection. Major players like CrowdStrike Holdings, Cloudflare Inc., and Rubrik Inc. are expected to benefit. Anthropic has chosen to keep Mythos private while collaborating with key partners such as AWS, Apple, Microsoft, and Google.

data.title: Anthropic launches Claude Code tools for 1M token sessions to aid in managing context efficiently. Explore more.
data.description: Anthropic has issued a comprehensive guide on deploying and managing commands and contexts for Claude Code, aiming to support developers in efficiently handling up to 1 million token sessions. The guide assists in enhancing navigation and utilization of the sessions for improved performance.

data.title: PsiQuantum, the University of Tokyo, and Mitsubishi Chemical Corporation Announce Partnership to Bolster Quantum Workforce Development in Japan
data.description: In Tokyo, PsiQuantum has collaborated with the University of Tokyo and Mitsubishi Chemical Corporation to offer specialized training for Japan's quantum labor force.
